subject: [SDC] Update sdc images for ElAlto
commit_message:
[SDC] Update sdc images for ElAlto

Update the sdc images for ElAlto maintenance release, moving to 1.5.3 for SDC images and 1.3.2-1 for dcae-ds.

Issue-ID: SDC-3199
Signed-off-by: sebdet <sebastien.determe@intl.att.com>
Change-Id: I6bf5ac31e65cc00703e7abfd7e5f9722c5b52881

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Azure 1: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds
Set Work In Progress

Patch Set 1:

We just to wait that the dcae-ds 1.3.2-1 are released so that it can work.
A recheck will be required

Patch Set 1:

OK!

Patch Set 1:

We have to wait that Ofir merges the dcae-ds PR so that we can release them.
The current PR will NOT work until we have DCAE-ds images.

I raised this PR as i'm off the next 2 weeks, so that my team can easily complete the maintenance release.

Christophe Closset will follow that
